log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Chromatic Dragonborn — Armored Escapist --- HP: 59/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.

→ Archmage: WIS save [d20(ADV):14+6=20 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists. (had advantage)
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.

══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Chromatic Dragonborn — Armored Escapist --- HP: 16/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Archmage (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save on Archmage.
→ Archmage: WIS save [d20:4+6=10 vs DC 15] FAIL!
--- Archmage --- HP: 99/99 | AC: 15 | Cond: [paralyzed]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
END OF TURN: WIS save vs Hold Person [d20:15+6=21 vs DC 15] SUCCESS! No longer paralyzed!
